Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
Remove legacy logging guide and migration guide; update environment and Sentry configuration

- Deleted the comprehensive logging guide and migration guide documents to streamline documentation.
- Updated the environment schema to include optional Sentry DSN configuration.
- Modified Sentry initialization to use the new environment variable for DSN.

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
feat(audits): Implement summary for critical issues resolution

- Added implementation summary document detailing the resolution of three critical issues identified in the codebase maturity audit.
- Document includes an overview, files modified, benefits of changes, and next steps for further improvements.

fix(logger): Enhance type safety in logger utility

- Replaced `any` types with `Record<string, unknown>` in logger methods.
- Improved handling of error objects with extended properties.

fix(queryClient): Improve type safety in query client error handling

- Introduced `ErrorResponse` interface for better typing of error data.
- Updated retry logic to handle errors with `statusCode` property.

test(jwt-auth-utils): Add unit tests for JWT authentication utilities

- Created comprehensive tests for `decodeTokenPayload` and `getUserFromToken` functions.
- Verified type safety improvements with `TokenPayload` interface.

test(app-header): Implement tests for app-header render behavior fix

- Added tests to ensure proper handling of cascading renders and performance optimizations.
- Verified usage of `startTransition` and `useRef` for location tracking.

test(use-jwt-auth): Add tests for memoization fixes in use-jwt-auth hook

- Verified that `hasRole` function is wrapped in `useCallback` and included in `useMemo` dependencies.
- Ensured no stale closures occur in context value memoization.

test(logger): Add unit tests for logger type safety improvements

- Verified that logger methods compile with strict TypeScript type checking.
- Ensured proper handling of complex metadata structures.

test(queryClient): Add unit tests for query client type safety improvements

- Verified that error handling logic respects type safety and retry limits.
- Ensured correct behavior for various error status codes.

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
feat(audit): Add security audit remediation plan with proposed fixes for critical findings

- F-001: Address exposed refresh token hashes in git history
  - Implement immediate token rotation and session invalidation
  - Remove sensitive files from git history using BFG Repo-Cleaner
  - Introduce secrets management with AWS Secrets Manager
  - Add pre-commit hook with Gitleaks for secret detection
  - Update .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive files

- F-002: Migrate hard-coded bcrypt password hashes to a secure database
  - Set up PostgreSQL schema for users and sessions
  - Create migration script to transfer data from JSON to database
  - Update storage layer to interact with the database
  - Remove sensitive JSON files post-migration

- F-003: Mitigate path traversal vulnerabilities in file transport
  - Create path sanitization utility to prevent unauthorized access
  - Update file transport logic to use sanitized paths
  - Add unit tests for path sanitization functions

- F-004: Prevent unsafe format string injection in logging
  - Replace string concatenation with structured logging
  - Implement SafeLogger class to sanitize log data

- Summary of modifications and implementation timeline included

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
feat(logging): Introduce comprehensive logging migration guide and new logging system

- Added logging-migration-guide.md to assist in migrating from legacy error-logger to new logger
- Updated package.json to use tsx for production start script
- Created build-server.js script for compiling TypeScript server files
- Integrated trace middleware for distributed tracing in server
- Enhanced server logger with createTracedLogger for context-aware logging
- Implemented centralized error codes in shared/error-codes.ts with metadata
- Added unit tests for error codes and error handling functions

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
Add comprehensive tests for server and client components

- Implement integration tests for server health and error handling.
- Create smoke tests for critical path validation.
- Set up client-side testing utilities and configurations.
- Add unit tests for various client components including ErrorBoundary, ThemeToggle, and Button.
- Develop unit tests for hooks like useIsMobile and useTheme.
- Introduce utility function tests for class name merging.
- Establish server-side tests for authentication, JWT utilities, and storage management.
- Enhance vitest configuration for better reporting and coverage output.

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
feat: Implement comprehensive testing infrastructure with Vitest

- Added vitest configuration and setup files for testing
- Created multiple test suites including smoke, unit, component, integration, and auth/security tests
- Configured CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions for automated testing
- Documented testing process in TESTING.md, TESTING_QUICK_START.md, and TESTING_COMPLETE.md
- Established pre-commit hooks with Husky and lint-staged for code quality enforcement

chore: Set up ESLint and Prettier for code quality

- Configured ESLint with TypeScript and React plugins
- Integrated Prettier for consistent code formatting
- Added Husky pre-commit hooks to run linting and formatting checks
- Updated package.json with linting and formatting scripts

test: Add authentication and integration tests

- Implemented tests for password hashing, JWT validation, and session management
- Created integration tests for server endpoints using Supertest
- Validated security headers and CORS configuration in tests

docs: Update documentation for testing and code quality

- Added detailed instructions for running tests and validating code quality
- Documented the structure of test files and configurations
- Provided guidelines for contributing to the codebase with testing in mind

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Kunal Suri
Message:
feat: Implement comprehensive security enhancements for Week 1

- Added INTEGRATION_CHECKLIST.md for pre-deployment verification and local testing procedures.
- Created SECURITY.md detailing security features and best practices.
- Compiled WEEK1_FINAL_REPORT.md summarizing implementation status and compliance with OWASP standards.
- Developed env.ts for environment variable validation using Zod for type safety and fail-fast configuration.
- Introduced validation.ts middleware for input validation and sanitization across API endpoints.
- Implemented security features including Helmet for HTTP headers, CORS configuration, rate limiting, and JWT security enhancements.
- Established logging for security events and validation errors.
